_source_of_truth: EDIT THIS FILE. `LEDGER.md` and `ledger.html` are GENERATED views — never hand-edit them; run `npm run ledger` (pre-commit also regenerates). Schema + workflow: README.md in this folder.
ledgerPhilosophy: EPHEMERAL working state, not history. Applied findings are DELETED (git + the commit message are the fix record), never stamped done. Keep only open/later rows + skip-tombstones.
_findingSchema: each finding: { id, dim, bucket, verdict, status, finding } + optional `pattern` — a one-line positive exemplar (the good pattern to follow), not just the problem. The loop's own anti-negative-instruction principle: state the target behavior, not only the prohibition. Full schema: README.md.
lastAudit: 2026-07-24 (recalibration) — D7-ledger-godot-stale + D7-suite-godot-stale APPLIED: pruned the 10 godot-world rows (builders-restates-verify, engine-version, display-clobber, greybox/arena eye-harden, model-pin-retier, docs-cache-dated + 3 godot tombstones — their spine is absent from this fork) and re-authored the suite to the fork spine; kept the 2 rows that still apply (caveman-gate, result-contract). NOTE: no `npm run ledger` regen script exists in this fork — LEDGER.md hand-synced; restoring the generator is parked. SAME DAY, earlier: domain-fork reality check (caveman, ultrathink). SPINE NOW = 5 CORE agents (cli/skill/transcript-researcher + designer + handoff-summarizer) + 8 agnostic skills + domains/{app,expo,webapp} packs; NO godot builders/tools/ui-orchestrator. D1 clean (max 4 skills/agent; designer=2 — an earlier 16 was a body-bullet miscount). D2/D3/D5 on current CORE spine clean; D4/D8/D10 inapplicable (godot verify/data-driven world gone). PRIOR: 2026-07-08 — full 9-dim fan-out pass (8 gather agents, ~355k subagent tokens).
parking: skill-content-gap dimension — a skill missing a known technique/caveat maps to no clean D1–D9

D11 'seam integrity' dimension — do the framework's own gates (promote/materialize/validate) enforce the conventions its docs state? [renumbered D10→D11 when abstraction-level/domain-layering took D10]
restore an `npm run ledger` generator for LEDGER.md/ledger.html — the views are hand-synced since the fork dropped the upstream script (the _source_of_truth line above still promises it)

dimensions.D9: harness load-bearing under the current model
dimensions.D10: abstraction-level / domain-layering (generic baseline vs domain payload; second-domain test; dependency-direction inversions)

findings.finding: plugin/commands/contribute.md (SHIPPED) is still built on the dead two-tree model: it stages domains/<name>/plugin/{skills,library}/ and its scope-safety rule forbids staging plugin/ (CORE) — but promote-run.js locate() lands promotions in plugin/{skills,library}/ (one tree). A path fix collapses the command's own safety rule, so it needs a redesign: distinguish contributable learnings from CORE by git history / promotions-board provenance instead of by path. Found 2026-07-24 while applying D7-suite-godot-stale.
findings.pattern: promote-run.js is the source of truth for where capabilities land; commands describe ITS behavior, not a remembered layout.

findings.finding: ui/server/features/skills/skill-scope.js (+ skill-scope.check.js) still models the godot {genre, style} game-profile filter with godot-* skill examples baked into comments and the check fixtures (godot-core, style-pixel, genre-fps). The MECHANISM (domain-tag filtering of an agent's preload list) is generic and possibly useful per-domain; the vocabulary is engine payload. Decide: re-parameterize profiles per domain pack (domain.json could declare its own profile axes) or strip the profile filter until a second domain needs it. Found 2026-07-24 recalibration sweep.
findings.pattern: generic mechanism, domain vocabulary — the axes a profile filters on should come from the domain descriptor, not hardcoded genre/style.

findings.finding: caveman enforcement is prompt-only (per-tool reminder hook deleted afa2a79, 2026-06-26) with NO compliance measurement; review iter1 claims ~0% compliance ('[cvmn]' in 0/708 blocks); decide: restore a slim observe+score hook (review P0B-2 + P0B-7 banned-pattern list) or measure first and accept prompt-only. Fork note: the shipped skill is caveman-forge (renamed over a builtin collision).

agent-report/SKILL.md:31 contracts the relayed result to '<path> — gate PASS|FAIL' but nothing enforces it — no SubagentStop hook anywhere (verified 2026-07-08); review measured ~1.2k-char avg prose results vs the ~50-char contract; harden: SubagentStop regex validator + digest cap ≤6 lines (review P0B-3 merged schema).
